title: Bare raise statements should only be used in except blocks
description: Bare raise statements should be avoided outside exception blocks as they can lead to unclear error handling.
message: Bare raise statement found outside except block.
recommendation: Use raise exceptions within exception blocks.

noncompliant.description: Bare raise statement outside except block.

compliant.description: Bare raise statement within except block.

why_is_this_an_issue: Bare raise statements outside exception blocks can lead to unclear error handling and make debugging difficult.

checks.message: Bare raise statement found outside except block.
